name: Ground Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Sour cream, mixed with 4 tbsp flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large skillet.
2. Add onions, garlic, and mushrooms to the skillet.
3. Saute until the onions are golden brown.
4. Transfer everything into a Crock-Pot.
5. Stir thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours.
7. Serve over hot buttered noodles or rice.
